targets.expr: sum by (model) (last_over_time(llm_batch_pipeline_requests_total{service_run_key="$run_key",status="success"}[30d])) or (absent(sum by (model) (last_over_time(llm_batch_pipeline_requests_total{service_run_key="$run_key",status="success"}[30d]))) * on() sum by (model) (last_over_time(llm_batch_pipeline_requests_total{backend="$backend",status="success"}[30d])))
last_over_time({service_name="llm-batch-pipeline"} | service_run_key="$run_key" | json | logger="llm_batch_pipeline.pipeline" | step="pipeline" | status="completed" | unwrap duration_ms [30d])
last_over_time({service_name="llm-batch-pipeline"} | service_run_key="$run_key" | json | logger="llm_batch_pipeline.stages" | step="discover" | status="ok" | unwrap count [30d])
last_over_time({service_name="llm-batch-pipeline"} | service_run_key="$run_key" | json | logger="llm_batch_pipeline.evaluation" | step="evaluate" | unwrap accuracy [30d])
last_over_time({service_name="llm-batch-pipeline"} | service_run_key="$run_key" | json | logger="llm_batch_pipeline.evaluation" | step="evaluate" | unwrap macro_f1 [30d])

avg by (step) (last_over_time({service_name="llm-batch-pipeline"} | service_run_key="$run_key" | json | logger="llm_batch_pipeline.pipeline" | step!="pipeline" | status="completed" | unwrap duration_ms [30d]))
{service_name="llm-batch-pipeline"} | service_run_key="$run_key" | json | logger="llm_batch_pipeline.pipeline" | step!="pipeline" | status="completed" | line_format ""

avg by (base_url) (last_over_time({service_name="llm-batch-pipeline"} | service_run_key="$run_key" | json | logger="llm_batch_pipeline.backends.$backend" | status="warmup_ok" | unwrap duration_ms [30d]))
sum by (reason) (count_over_time({service_name="llm-batch-pipeline"} | service_run_key="$run_key" | json | logger="llm_batch_pipeline.filters" | status="dropped" [30d]))
